meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve tutorial hell (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome tutorial hell. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Setup: Beat Tutorial Hell (Founder Checklist)
content.seo_description: Stop watching videos and start shipping. A founder-focused guide to setting up Claude Code and Antigravity to build production-ready AI SaaS products faster.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell ends when you stop consuming and start iterating. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform your CLI into a senior engineering partner. This setup automates boilerplate, enforces architectural consistency, and accelerates your path to a revenue-generating MVP by focusing on business logic over syntax errors.
content.intro:
The screen glows with a thousand lines of copy-pasted code, yet your SaaS dashboard remains empty. You’ve mastered the art of watching tutorials, but you’re starving for real-world execution. The gap between 'following along' and 'shipping value' is a graveyard of abandoned side projects.

Today, we close that gap. By weaponizing Claude Code alongside Antigravity, you shift from passive learner to active builder. This isn't just about coding; it's about building a scalable engine that turns your business requirements into deployable assets. Stop reading, start building, and monetize your vision.

steps.title: Environment Hardening
steps.description: Establish a clean, robust workspace. Claude Code requires a stable foundation to avoid hallucinated dependencies and runtime friction.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a production-grade Node.js/TypeScript environment with strict ESLint rules and a deployment-ready folder structure.

steps.title: Architectural Blueprinting
steps.description: Define your SaaS domain model. Before writing code, use AI to map out your database schema and API endpoints to ensure scalability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a scalable Postgres schema for a SaaS platform including user auth, subscription tiers, and project entities.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Review the schema for potential bottlenecks in high-concurrency scenarios.'

steps.title: Rapid Feature Iteration
steps.description: Build the core value proposition. Focus on the 'Golden Path'—the specific flow that leads a user to pay you money.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a reusable React component for the core dashboard feature using Tailwind CSS and Lucide icons.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the user onboarding flow based on the schema defined in step 2.'

steps.title: Automated Testing Suite
steps.description: Implement 'test-driven development' (TDD) via AI. If it isn't tested, it doesn't exist in production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write unit tests for the core payment integration logic ensuring edge case coverage for failed transactions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate and execute Jest tests for the current feature set.'

steps.title: Deployment Optimization
steps.description: Bridge the gap between local development and live revenue. Configure your CI/CD pipeline to automate deployments.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Vercel-compatible deployment configuration with environment variable validation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Identify potential security vulnerabilities in the current build before deployment.'

pro_tips: Always define your 'Definition of Done' in a .claudeignore file to prevent the AI from refactoring code that is already production-stable.
Use Claude Code's 'ask' command to explain complex logic before committing, preventing technical debt accumulation.
Treat your Antigravity prompts like PRD documents; be specific about the business outcome, not just the code syntax.
Run periodic 'Architecture Audits' with Claude to ensure your feature growth doesn't violate your initial database constraints.
Leverage the CLI history to create a 'Builder's Journal', allowing you to roll back specific architectural decisions that didn't convert.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is functional, prioritize integrating Stripe for payments. Use Claude Code to build the checkout webhook handler, then deploy to a live environment to start gathering user feedback.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools. You have the guide. The only thing missing is the commit history that changes your life. Stop waiting for the perfect moment—create it. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
